name: claude-workflow
description: 6-phase Claude-native development workflow — Research, Ideation, Plan, Execute, Review, Finalize. Multi-model orchestration via ECC agents. Fully resumable across sessions.

scripts.test: npm run test:claude-workflow && npm run validate:codex-workflow
scripts.test:claude-workflow: bash -n install.sh uninstall.sh && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-plugin/plugin.json', 'utf8'))" && node scripts/validate-workflow-contracts.js && node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js && claude plugin validate .
